flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Central Michigan University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (9.9k vs 13.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Central Michigan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $14.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Central Michigan University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.2k → $14.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Michigan University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (11.3k → 10.0k).
